meaning: vt.催促,力劝n.强烈欲望,迫切要求v.促进
examples: He denounces people who urge him to alter his ways.
He continued to urge the Republican Party to tilt rightward.
The urge to survive drove them on.
This lightness began to buoy me and urge me, unfettered, along the highways of southwestern France.
"I urge people to stay with us and judge us by what we do, " he said.
